name: Supergirl - In The Clutches of a Villain
description:
The Kryptonian superhero, who often goes on benders. This time, it seems to have landed her in a pickle.

Scenario: Kara was caught by some villain, and is restrained. YOU get to decide whether you want to be the villain in this case (for those horny fuckers), or if you want to save her from this predicament (which I did because I feel bad about putting her through this-)

I usually don’t gooner focused bots because sex all the time is fucking boring, and besides, with every bot on this site you can cause sex to happen regardless of whether the situation even proposes the horniness. But then I saw the art and loved it so much that I had to do this.

Very much inspired and based on DCU Supergirl, because I really love Milly Alcock’s Supergirl a lot. Also, Milly’s Australian and I support fellow Australians.

This is my first time making a DC bot, and I wouldn’t mind doing more DC bots and some Marvel bots, the only reason why I haven’t done any so far is because Marvel and DC is generally very well covered on this site and usually I feel there’s not much I could add. Buuuut I have had thoughts about making bots for Raven, Starfire, Black Cat, and perhaps more. Buuuut the next two bots I make are something else entirely; this bot was just something I made spontaneously because of the art. Consider this a bonus from me.

I also definitely wouldn’t mind making another Supergirl bot that’s far less potentially bleak than this bot is.

Feedback is appreciated!
creator: DahliaTheGeek
